summary: Excellent upgraded soundboard capture with a mesmerizing Lovelight “meltdown” moment early in the set
review: Both reviewers praise this version as a clear, high‑fidelity upgrade over earlier releases, indicating an excellent soundboard source. Musically the highlight is the psychedelic “meltdown” at the end of the first Lovelight, which they describe as a Coltrane‑style vortex that resolves back into Pig’s R&B groove, making the performance especially compelling.

ai_rating.rationale: Both reviews are high‑rated (5 and 4 stars) and focus on superb audio quality plus a standout musical moment, leading to an overall strong rating despite the small sample size.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Reviewers note this version is a great upgrade over prior releases and seek a lossless seed, implying crisp, clear sound with no reported flaws.

show_quality.setlist_flow: The set features an early psychedelic peak during Lovelight that creates a dramatic, trancelike vortex before settling back into groove, giving the concert a dynamic and engaging flow.

band_member_comments.Jerry: Mentioned as appreciating the attempt to capture an analog psychedelic experience; his playing drives the “meltdown” vibe.
